name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Crush vanilla wafers and mix with pecans.
3. Press mixture into bottom of springform pan.
4. Microwave caramels until melted; spread over crust.
5. Bake for 5 minutes in preheated oven.
6. Stir melted margarine, evaporated milk, cream cheese, and vanilla together.
7. Pour mixture over caramel layer.
8. Sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
9. Return to oven and bake for another 30-35 minutes until set.
10. Let cool completely before serving.
